import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Publish Bundles"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/{organisation}/{event}/bundles/publish"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Publishes one or more draft bundles: validates includes, creates Stripe product/prices and sets status to live.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"organisation","in":"path","description":"Organisation slug","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","title":"organisation"}},{"name":"event","in":"path","description":"Event slug or ID","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","title":"event"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"description":"Bundles to publish","required":false,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["bundles"],"properties":{"bundles":{"type":"array","description":"List of bundle KSUIDs to publish","items":{"type":"string"}}},"x-internal-group":"bundles","x-internal-path":"_pydantic/models","title":"PublishBundlesRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"201":{"description":"Bundles published successfully.","headers":{}},"409":{"description":"Some bundles were not draft.","headers":{}},"422":{"description":"Some bundles were not publishable.","headers":{}},"500":{"description":"Internal server error.","headers":{}},"502":{"description":"Stripe creation failed.","headers":{}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
